channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Easy POJO to JSON - Mon May 18 02:46:01 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: August Lee downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.augustlee.tool.easypojo2json

item.title: Targetprocess Connector - Tue May 19 15:29:13 UTC 2026
item.description:

item.title: Task Worktree - Wed May 20 09:21:02 UTC 2026
